steps.t: The winding Swiftwater River has a shallow ford north of Flodgeheld where the cliff walls dip down into steep but climbable banks along the river; how…
A footprint can be seen in the grass on the other side of the ford. It was likely made by the White Hand that were suspected to have come through here…
It seems likely that more footprints were made which could help indicate which direction they went. You should search the land as it rises north of th…
The grass grows thick as the ground rises from the river, and it may be harder to follow the trail of the White Hand. You will need to search for more…
The party of White Hand that crossed the river appeared to lead in the direction of one of Gifemund's mines, Mate Isernore.
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farmhouse in Woodhurst. You have much to tell Herubrand, with your efforts in Brockbridge, the situations in Flodgeh…
